headline: Previously Rejected Articles Now Recovered
subject: Recovered Articles

article_items.title: Company : The Verge AI
article_items.description: [HIGH] The Social Reckoning trailer gives us our first look at Jeremy Strong as Zuck Company : The Verge AI Summary : Over 15 years after David Fincher and Aaron Sorkin's The Social Network premiered in theaters, Sony has released the first trailer for The Social Reckoning ahead of its theatrical release on October 9 Link :

article_items.title: Company : The Verge AI
article_items.description: [HIGH] AT&T is launching $3 ‘unlimited’ day passes for iPads Company : The Verge AI Summary : AT&T has introduced a new "Unlimited Day Pass" cellular data offer for iPad users who need brief connectivity instead of signing up for a long-term plan. The day pass is available for $3 in the US Link :

article_items.description: [HIGH] Insta360’s Luna Ultra 8K stabilized camera is now available in the US Company : The Verge AI Summary : Following months of teases, leaks, a secretive debut at NAB 2026, and an initial launch in China, Insta360 finally announced global availability for its first handheld stabilized camera. The Luna Ultr Link :

article_items.title: Company : The Verge AI
article_items.description: [MEDIUM] The AirPods Pro 3 are $179 at Walmart, their best-ever price Company : The Verge AI Summary : Ahead of Prime Day, Walmart is offering the best price we’ve seen yet on the Apple AirPods 3 wireless earbuds. Originally $249 (though commonly selling somewhere between $200 and $220), they’re $179 a Link :
